zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Moleyns於1426年6月11日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯時，她的父親Sir William de Moleyns20歲，母親Anne Whalesborough22歲。她於大約1441年與Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年3月10日在英國維爾爾海斯波利享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Moleyns于1426年6月11日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯时，她的父亲Sir William de Moleyns20岁，母亲Anne Whalesborough22岁。她于大约1441年与Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1476年3月10日在英国維爾爾海斯波利享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Moleyns was born on 11 June 1426, in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir William de Moleyns, was 20 and her mother, Anne Whalesborough, was 22. She married Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford about 1441. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 10 March 1476, in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Moleyns est née le 11 juin 1426, à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Moleyns, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anne Whalesborough, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford environ 1441. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 mars 1476, à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Moleyns am 11. Juni 1426 in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Moleyns 20 und ihre Mutter Anne Whalesborough 22. Sie hat um 1441 Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. März 1476 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Moleyns è nata il il 11 giugno 1426 nel Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Moleyns, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Anne Whalesborough, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford circa 1441. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 marzo 1476, nel Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Moleynsが1426年6月11日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズで生まれた時，父Sir William de Moleynsは20歳，母Anne Whalesboroughは22歳であった。約1441年にRobert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1476年3月10日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Moleyns(이)가 1426년 6월 11일 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Moleyns(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Whalesborough(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1441년 Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 3월 10일 영국 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Moleyns nasceu em 11 de junho de 1426, em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Moleyns, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Anne Whalesborough, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford aproximadamente 1441. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de março de 1476, em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Moleyns родилась 11 июня 1426 г. в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Moleyns было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Whalesborough, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Hungerford 3rd Baron Hungerford около 1441 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 марта 1476 г. в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
